description: Style NoteAn eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and nubuck upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.Product DetailsRound toed, blue canvas shoes with branding near the ankle and blue lace up fasteningCanvas upper with nubuck overlays in the midfoot region and nubuck patch with perforations for breathability below the toe boxSlightly cushioned footbedEVA midsoleTough rubber outsole with exaggerated herring bone grooves on one side and brick style grooves on the other sideShoe careClean the nubuck patches using a nubuck brushTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
